{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Heaven's Glory sect
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Heaven's Glory sect]] contains an ancestor's tomb with a stone door marked with four beasts.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
